title: 3D-EndCrystals
description: Simple texture to make the end crystal in item state 3D
body:
##  Minecraft 3D EndCrystals
- __No optifine required!__
- __It should work with most versions!__
![crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oGaZs58C/images/b22fa69d4b3774ce71b158dc2d161148acad69ca.png)
